name: @nosuchmachine/daylight-bottle
description: Browser-first encrypted message-in-a-bottle app for bottle.nosuchmachine.net.

scripts.typecheck:production: npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:production && npm run typecheck:test
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:bundle && npm run wrangler:dry-run
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build && npm run verify:bundle && npm run wrangler:dry-run
scripts.deploy: npm run check && npm run validate:production-config && WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false WRANGLER_WRITE_LOGS=false wrangler deploy
